name: ecommerce-load-tests
description: k6 load tests for FIS Global e-commerce microservices

scripts.build: npx esbuild k6/smoke.ts k6/baseline.ts k6/ramp-up.ts k6/stress.ts k6/spike.ts k6/soak.ts k6/order-flow.ts k6/virtual-threads-benchmark.ts k6/setup/seed-data.ts --bundle --platform=neutral --target=es2017 --outdir=dist --outbase=k6 --external:k6 --external:k6/*
scripts.smoke: npm run build && k6 run dist/smoke.js
scripts.baseline: npm run build && k6 run dist/baseline.js
scripts.ramp-up: npm run build && k6 run dist/ramp-up.js
scripts.stress: npm run build && k6 run dist/stress.js
scripts.spike: npm run build && k6 run dist/spike.js
scripts.soak: npm run build && k6 run dist/soak.js
scripts.order-flow: npm run build && k6 run dist/order-flow.js
scripts.vt-bench: npm run build && k6 run dist/virtual-threads-benchmark.js
